canonical_name: every garden she had ever entered in all her life
the small, once-prisoned thing within her
so many of my Companions scattered to the four corners of the world
this land whereof God has given me the stewardship
the two greatest men within the borders of this world
two of those she had loved best
the maiden who fell in love with a wild beast from the depths of the forest
the daughter she had never had
a servant in the dress of the court
one fully trained priestess in Avalon whom the Merlin would not know by sight
